mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attachment (id, parent_id, parent_type, name, size, type, url, uploaded_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{parentId}, #{parentType}, #{name}, #{size}, #{type}, #{url}, #{uploadedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM attachment WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND parent_type = #{parentType}
SELECT * FROM attachment WHERE parent_id = #{id} AND parent_type = 'note'
SELECT * FROM attachment WHERE parent_id = #{id} AND parent_type = 'todo'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM attachment WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND parent_type = #{parentType}
